idea: Baseline SM86 sparse GEMM using mma.sp.sync.aligned (WARP_M=16, WARP_N=8, WARP_K=16). Fallback from e4m3 to f16 due to SM86 FP8 sparse MMA limitation.
expected_gain: Establish baseline TFLOPS for SM86 sparse tensor core performance
notes: FP8 e4m3 sparse GEMM requires SM90+. SM86 only supports f16/bf16 sparse MMA via mma.sp.sync.aligned instruction.
